title: Harry Potter and the Half-Blood Prince
posterAlt: Harry Potter and the Half-Blood Prince (2009) movie poster
tmdbOverview: Dumbledore tries to prepare Harry for the final battle with Voldemort while Death Eaters wreak havoc in both Muggle and Wizard worlds.
synopsis: Harry Potter and the Half-Blood Prince (2009) is a adventure and fantasy film from United Kingdom and United States. It holds a solid 7.6 rating on IMDb. It appears on several of our curated Top 10 lists. It carries a PG certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
